creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
The new firefox-19.0,1 is crashing in page loading.


After typing the URL in the loakation bar and pressing enter the browser is crashing.

It shows - for a short moment - the title of the page in der title bar of the browser, but then crashing.

How-To-Repeat: type any ULR in the loaction bar and type ENTER.
